notes.en: Add methanol last, bring to 1 L. For proteins >100 kDa, add 0.01–0.05% SDS. Use cold (4°C). Do not adjust pH.
notes.zh: 加入甲醇后定容至 1 L。转膜大蛋白 (>100 kDa) 可加 0.01–0.05% SDS。4°C 使用。不要调 pH。

storage.notes: Add methanol fresh; keep cold during wet transfer

usage.en: Wet or semi-dry transfer buffer for moving proteins from SDS-PAGE gel to membrane.
usage.zh: 蛋白转膜缓冲液，用于 SDS-PAGE 后湿转或半干转膜。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve Tris base and glycine in ~700 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.warning: Methanol is toxic and flammable — handle in fume hood.

prepSteps.step: Add SDS to 0.01–0.1% for large proteins (>100 kDa) if needed.
Bring to final volume of 1000 mL with ddH₂O.
Chill to 4°C before use (transfer generates heat).
